creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:40:39 2014
New Revision: 355214
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355214
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355214/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/189579
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Heap-Simple-XS/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Heap-Simple-XS/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Heap-Simple-XS/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:34 2014	(r355213)
+++ head/devel/p5-Heap-Simple-XS/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:39 2014	(r355214)
@@ -7,14 +7,17 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An XS implementation of the Heap::Simple interface
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	XS implementation of the Heap::Simple interface
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Heap-Simple>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Heap-Simple
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
-CONFIGURE_ARGS+=-n
+CONFIGURE_ARGS=	-n
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
